subject: Leave Request - Zhao Li (Marketing Dept) 5 Days Annual Leave
body:
Hi HR,

I am requesting 5 days of annual leave from April 7 to April 11, 2026, to visit family back home. My employee ID is EMP-201. My annual leave balance should still be 8 days.

Please approve.
Zhao Li

subject: Leave Request - Sun Qiang (Engineering Dept) 3 Days Annual Leave
body:
Hi HR,

I am requesting 3 days of annual leave from April 14 to April 16, 2026. My employee ID is EMP-202. I believe my annual leave balance is 10 days.

Thank you!
Sun Qiang

subject: Leave Request - Wang Min (Finance Dept) 7 Days Annual Leave
body:
Hi HR,

I am requesting 7 days of annual leave (April 21 - April 29) for an overseas vacation. My employee ID is EMP-203. I checked and my annual leave balance should be 5 days. I would like to use comp-time to cover the remaining 2 days.

Wang Min

subject: Leave Request - Huang Lei (Engineering Dept) 2 Days Annual Leave
body:
Hi HR,

Please approve my annual leave request for 2 days (April 3 - April 4). My employee ID is EMP-204. My annual leave balance should be 6 days.

Huang Lei

subject: Annual Leave Balance System Update Notification
body:
HR Administrator,

The following are the annual leave balance system records as of March 19, 2026:
- EMP-201 Zhao Li: Remaining 6 days (not 8, 2 days used in Feb)
- EMP-202 Sun Qiang: Remaining 10 days
- EMP-203 Wang Min: Remaining 5 days
- EMP-204 Huang Lei: Remaining 4 days (not 6, 2 days used in Jan)

Please verify whether each employee's claimed balance is accurate.

HR System Automated Notification
